title: Property development – supporting information
description: Information to provide with your objection or private ruling request about property development.
keywords: subdivision or property development, subdivision, income, property development, business income, subdivision business

content_blocks.text: How to apply for a private ruling
First check whether your question is answered in Tax consequences on sales of property .
To apply for a private ruling about property development:

items: complete and submit a private ruling application form
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: To lodge an objection about property development:

items: complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for a private ruling or objection about property development includes:

items: details of the subdivision or development (for additional information required for subdivision, see Land subdivision – supporting information )
relevant contracts, including joint venture agreements
outline of the scale of the activities
details of any previous subdivision or development activities you have been involved in
details of how the project is being financed
details of the extent of your involvement in the project
details of the use of the property from the date of acquisition.

content_text:
## How to apply for a private ruling
First check whether your question is answered in Tax consequences on sales of property .
To apply for a private ruling about property development:
- complete and submit a private ruling application form
- provide the supporting information listed below.
## How to lodge an objection
To lodge an objection about property development:
- complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
- provide the supporting information listed below.
## Supporting information
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for a private ruling or objection about property development includes:
- details of the subdivision or development (for additional information required for subdivision, see Land subdivision – supporting information )
- relevant contracts, including joint venture agreements
- outline of the scale of the activities
- details of any previous subdivision or development activities you have been involved in
- details of how the project is being financed
- details of the extent of your involvement in the project
- details of the use of the property from the date of acquisition.
